package handler

import (
	"errors"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var (
	ErrUserNotFound     = errors.New("user not found")
	ErrUserDuplicate    = errors.New("user already exists")
	ErrInvalidInput     = errors.New("invalid input")
	ErrDatabaseError    = errors.New("database error")
)

type UserHandler struct{}

func (h *UserHandler) GetUser(c *gin.Context) {
	err := fetchUser(c.Param("id"))
	if err != nil {
		if errors.Is(err, ErrUserNotFound) {
			c.JSON(http.StatusNotFound, gin.H{"error": "user not found"})
		} else if errors.Is(err, ErrDatabaseError) {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "internal server error"})
		} else {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "unknown error"})
		}
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"message": "ok"})
}

func (h *UserHandler) CreateUser(c *gin.Context) {
	err := createUser()
	if err != nil {
		if errors.Is(err, ErrUserDuplicate) {
			c.JSON(http.StatusConflict, gin.H{"error": "user already exists"})
		} else if errors.Is(err, ErrInvalidInput) {
			c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "invalid input"})
		} else if errors.Is(err, ErrDatabaseError) {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "internal server error"})
		} else {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "unknown error"})
		}
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusCreated, gin.H{"message": "created"})
}

func (h *UserHandler) UpdateUser(c *gin.Context) {
	err := updateUser(c.Param("id"))
	if err != nil {
		if errors.Is(err, ErrUserNotFound) {
			c.JSON(http.StatusNotFound, gin.H{"error": "user not found"})
		} else if errors.Is(err, ErrInvalidInput) {
			c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "invalid input"})
		} else if errors.Is(err, ErrDatabaseError) {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "internal server error"})
		} else {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "unknown error"})
		}
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"message": "updated"})
}

func (h *UserHandler) DeleteUser(c *gin.Context) {
	err := deleteUser(c.Param("id"))
	if err != nil {
		if errors.Is(err, ErrUserNotFound) {
			c.JSON(http.StatusNotFound, gin.H{"error": "user not found"})
		} else if errors.Is(err, ErrDatabaseError) {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "internal server error"})
		} else {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "unknown error"})
		}
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"message": "deleted"})
}

func fetchUser(id string) error   { return ErrUserNotFound }
func createUser() error           { return ErrUserDuplicate }
func updateUser(id string) error  { return ErrInvalidInput }
func deleteUser(id string) error  { return ErrDatabaseError }
